slug.description: The project slug. Must match the slug of the source design artifact. Example: deploy-rollback

adrs.description: One ADR record per confirmed decision point, in agenda order. Must be a JSON array, never a string.

decision_point.description: The technology decision dimension name (e.g. 'API framework', 'Database + ORM (relational)').

architectural_signal.description: The specific design artifact field and value that triggered this dimension. Use 'human_added' for manually added decisions.

candidates.description: Technology candidates surfaced during deliberation. Minimum 2 required — never deliberate on a single option.

tradeoffs.description: Honest strengths and weaknesses in this specific context. Must not be empty.

constraints_surfaced.description: Constraints raised by the human during deliberation. Empty array is valid only if no constraints were raised. Must be a JSON array, never a string. Use [] if none.

chosen.description: The confirmed technology name — not a description or phrase.

rationale.description: Why this technology was chosen. Must reference the specific constraints that drove the choice.

rejections.description: One entry per non-chosen candidate. rejection_reason must be non-empty. Must be a JSON array, never a string.

candidate.description: The name of the non-chosen candidate.

rejection_reason.description: Why this candidate was not chosen. Must be non-empty — a blank rejection is not a deliberation trail.

open_questions.description: Genuine post-draft gaps only (e.g. version compatibility not verified). Must be a JSON array, never a string. Use [] if none.

decision_log_entry.description: Entry to append to the artifact's decision_log. Required on every write_tech_stack call.

summary.description: Plain-language description of what was decided or changed. On re-open: must name the decision point and the constraint that triggered the re-open.

trigger.description: initial_draft on v1; human_feedback on post-draft refinement; scope_change when a re-open changes a prior choice.

changed_fields.description: Must be a JSON array, never a string. Use [] if unknown. Use ['adrs'] for first draft or re-open changes.
